Notice Of Hearing Re Petition To Compel Respondent Action Property Management, Inc. To Binding Arbitration Pursuant To Cal. Code Civil Proc. 1290 Et Seq.
Off Calendar Oct-10-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER 2177 THIRD STREET PROPERTY OWNER LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY Notice Of Hearing Re Petition To Compel Respondent Action Property Management, Inc. To Binding Arbitration Pursuant To Cal. Code Civil Proc. 1290 Et Seq.

Petitioner 2177 Third Street Property Owner LLC's Petition to Compel Arbitration is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
